title: Integration tests + README
description: Write integration tests that verify the full flow: WebSocket connect → token auth → key exchange → encrypted CDP relay → tab management → disconnect. Write README.md with setup instructions, PSK configuration, architecture overview, and Chrome loading instructions.
acceptanceCriteria: Integration test: full auth → key exchange → encrypted CDP roundtrip
Integration test: MITM detection (wrong PSK → hello decryption fails)
Integration test: sequence counter violation → close with 4003
Integration test: token rotation invalidates old token
Integration test: tab list/switch through encrypted channel
README covers: installation, PSK setup, connecting, architecture, troubleshooting
README documents the yellow infobar expectation
README documents minimum Chrome version requirement (114+)
